chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1063 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6136/2023 (C/A) 07.11.2023 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.2 to 6 has filed statement along with original relieving order and last pay certificate; a copy of which is supplied to petitioner. The petitioner has, however, submitted that increments of four years since 2019 have not been included in the last pay certificate. Learned Counsel for respondents-University submits that this issue was put up before the Syndicate and was decided, but minutes of the same have not been issued. As soon as the minutes are released, the issue of four increments of petitioner would be accordingly decided and he would be intimated in black and white. Accordingly, this application is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
